calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar May-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:44 am and concluding at 11:08 am.

Plaintiff 1242 Market Street, LTD is present represented by Eric McFarland, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Soko Inc. not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

VICTOR MAKRAS is sworn to testify on behalf of plaintiff and testifies.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff 1242 Market Street, LTD, and against Defendant Soko Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $267,400.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $50,756.67
3. Costs: $0
4. Attorney fees: $19,328.33

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $337,485.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
